title: Minimum Time to Make Array Sum At Most x
titleCn: 使数组和小于等于 x 的最少时间

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2,3], nums2 = [1,2,3], x = 4 Output: 3 Explanation: For the 1st second, we apply the operation on i = 0. Therefore nums1 = [0,2+2,3+3] = [0,4,6]. For the 2nd second, we apply the operation on i = 1. Therefore nums1 = [0+1,0,6+3] = [1,0,9]. For the 3rd second, we apply the operation on i = 2. Therefore nums1 = [1+1,0+2,0] = [2,2,0]. Now sum of nums1 = 4. It can be shown that these operations are optimal, so we return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: For the 1st second, we apply the operation on i = 0. Therefore nums1 = [0,2+2,3+3] = [0,4,6]. For the 2nd second, we apply the operation on i = 1. Therefore nums1 = [0+1,0,6+3] = [1,0,9]. For the 3rd second, we apply the operation on i = 2. Therefore nums1 = [1+1,0+2,0] = [2,2,0]. Now sum of nums1 = 4. It can be shown that these operations are optimal, so we return 3.

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2,3], nums2 = [3,3,3], x = 4 Output: -1 Explanation: It can be shown that the sum of nums1 will always be greater than x, no matter which operations are performed.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It can be shown that the sum of nums1 will always be greater than x, no matter which operations are performed.
